meaning: n.迁移,移动,传递,转移,调任,转帐,过户,转让vt.转移,调转,调任,传递,转让,改变vi.转移,转学,换车
examples: The novel does not transfer well to the movies.
You can transfer data to a disk in a few seconds.
How can I transfer money from my bank account to his?
And reserve team midfielder Vincent Weijl has completed a transfer to Spanish side SD Eibar.
To transfer information from short-term to long-term memory, the brain requires periods of rest.
